assumption: Policy options are treated as separate choices
risk_if_wrong: Real policy portfolios may combine options
review_action: Test hybrid portfolios and staged packages

assumption: Metrics are normalized between zero and one
risk_if_wrong: Normalization can hide scale and distributional stakes

assumption: Metric weights are explicit and fixed for the base run
review_action: Run sensitivity tests and stakeholder weighting
Use evidence expert review and participatory scenario design

assumption: Legitimacy is represented as a score
risk_if_wrong: Public trust cannot be reduced to one number
review_action: Pair model output with qualitative review
Add staffing procurement and operational timelines

assumption: Composite score is not a decision rule
risk_if_wrong: Model output may be mistaken for an automatic answer
review_action: Use decision records and public reasoning
